name: systemthinkinglab
description: Systems Thinking Lab tools for Claude Code.

plugins.name: design-with-blocks
plugins.description: Design an application using the 7 Universal Building Blocks framework: decompose features into blocks, get per-block technology recommendations, and output a buildable design doc.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: An AI mentor for junior engineers: plan-first coaching, a compounding codebase wiki, and an honest ledger of what you've actually demonstrated you know.
